name: CNBX Pharmaceuticals Inc.
summary: CNBX Pharmaceuticals Inc. is a clinical-stage company based in Bethesda, Maryland, focused on the discovery, development, and commercialization of novel cannabinoid-based products for cancer treatment. Its lead product, Cannabics SR, is an oral sustained-release capsule for cancer anorexia cachexia syndrome (CACS). Its second candidate, RCC-33, is a first-in-class anti-neoplastic drug for colorectal cancer. R&D is conducted in a government-licensed lab in Israel through its wholly owned subsidiary G.R.I.N Ultra Ltd.
